## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
A Minecraft server listing website targeting Israeli players, featuring a Steve (Minecraft character) with a club as the background hero image. The site allows

Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
